content:
CrossFit W.O.D
Strength:
On A 14:00 Min Running Clock:
Build Up For Range 3 Deficit HSPU

Metcon:
16:00 Min EMOM, For Max Reps:
1.) 2DB Front Rack Lunges #2x22.5/15kg
2.) Burpees
3.) 2DB STOH
4.) Cals Row

CrossFit Endurance
15:00 Min AMRAP:
400m Run
20 Box Jumps #60/50cm
16 Alt. 1DB Snatch #1x15/10kg

05:00 Min Rest

Into
15:00 Min AMRAP:
10 Burpees To Plate #15/10kg
15 Plate Gtoh
20 Alt. Plate Bearhug Lunges
